_comment: Canonical training-dataset spec — the SINGLE cross-machine source of truth (ADR-001). The data layer regenerates the FULL dataset from this file + the pinned can-telemetry-forge version, so desktop and notebook produce byte-identical data. This is NOT the reduced committed sample: the smoke fixture in data/sample_readings.parquet exists only so the repo runs offline/CI; models are ALWAYS trained on the full dataset regenerated from here. Any subset of keys overrides the generator's bundled default fleet.
